justification: Bird's missing output is explicitly detected ('Bird's task shows status completed but no actual deliverable output was received'). Formal escalation stops synthesis — no handoff brief is produced. Escalation clearly states what is missing (domain rules, correctness criteria, business constraints, testable assertions like heartbeat freshness thresholds and region assignment rules) and why it matters ('risks building something technically sound but functionally incorrect'). No domain content is invented — freshness threshold is listed as unknown in low_confidence_areas rather than assumed.

observations.text: Escalation is structured and formal with type 'missing_input', not just a side note
No handoff brief produced — synthesis correctly halted
Explicitly flags that domain rules are 'load-bearing' and Shaq needs testable assertions only Bird can define
Does not invent domain values — heartbeat threshold listed as unknown ('is it 30s, 60s, 5min?') rather than assumed
Provides actionable options for resolution rather than just complaining
Low confidence score (30) accurately reflects the incomplete input state
